subject: IGY
body:
Hi Jeffrey!
I went to IGY today and was introduced around the office. They will send me
an offer letter at the end of the week.

I researched the companies on my radar and IGY is rather impressive in terms
of transparance and professionalism. Arabic co's are very shady.

Below are the companies I'm talking to. Please, if you have any opinion
other than IGY being the best choice, do tell me. Your voice always weighs
the heaviest to me:

1. *IGY*

2. *Arab Real Estate Company:* Kuwaiti, public company. $250 million market
cap. Acquired huge piece of land in Dubai. I would be on investment team
structuring the financing. They need approval by HQ and expect to give me
offer after 8 Dec.

3. *Dubai Investment Group:* M&A team. Supposedly rich. Huge,
recent acquisitions. I'm at last stage of interview process and just have to
pass the HR guy.

Always much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062

3. Dubai Investment Group: M&A team. Supposedly rich. Huge, recent acquisitions. I'm at last stage of interview process and just have to pass the HR guy.
 
Always much love,

Cecilia Steen
